title: Python Basics
description: Get started with Python: syntax, variables, lists, functions.

lessons.title: Variables
lessons.subtitle: Dynamic typing
lessons.starterCode: # TODO: assign 42 to answer and print it
lessons.task: Assign the integer 42 to a variable named answer and print it.

lessons.title: Lists
lessons.subtitle: Ordered collections
lessons.starterCode:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
# TODO: print the sum of nums
lessons.task: Print the sum of the elements in the nums list.

lessons.title: Functions
lessons.subtitle: def keyword
lessons.starterCode:
# TODO: define square(x) that returns x*x

print(square(6))
lessons.task: Define a function square(x) that returns x*x. The program should print 36.
